title: Implement fictional personas and run-specific canaries

environment.os: Windows local; GitHub Actions pending on Ubuntu and Windows

commands.name: Missing fictional-persona and canary module
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/synthetic-data.test.ts --project property tests/property/synthetic-data.property.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Both suites failed to import the not-yet-implemented synthetic-data module and zero tests ran

commands.name: Undefined fictional-persona browser behavior
commands.expectedFailure: All twelve existing background steps passed while three JRN-01 scenarios and eighteen behavior steps were undefined

commands.name: Missing PostgreSQL repository and signed routes
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/synthetic-data.test.ts apps/web/tests/integration/synthetic-data-routes.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The integration suite could not import the repository and the route suite could not import the missing endpoints

commands.name: Strict scanner exposed trusted-envelope projection
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/synthetic-data.test.ts --project property tests/property/synthetic-data.property.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: PROP-16 shrank to one email field because the service passed principal, workspace, and confirmation fields into the strict persona-data scanner

commands.name: Persona examples and seeded run-isolation property
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/synthetic-data.test.ts --project property tests/property/synthetic-data.property.test.ts

commands.name: PostgreSQL audit contract required actor kind
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/synthetic-data.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Persona and blocked-scan audit inserts omitted the database's required actor_kind column

commands.name: PostgreSQL confirmation, scan, source, uniqueness, and immutability proof
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project integration tests/integration/synthetic-data.test.ts

commands.name: Forged-role request exposed authorization ordering
commands.command: pnpm --filter @pactwire/core build && pnpm --filter @pactwire/web typecheck && pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/web/tests/integration/synthetic-data-routes.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: A reviewer received body-validation 400 before the signed server identity produced the expected audited permission denial

commands.name: Signed HTTP and PostgreSQL synthetic-data boundaries
commands.command: pnpm --filter @pactwire/core build && pnpm exec vitest run --project integration apps/web/tests/integration/synthetic-data-routes.test.ts tests/integration/synthetic-data.test.ts

commands.name: Focused likely-real-data and run-canary browser journeys
Shared domain schema and migration reconciliation
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/domain-schemas.test.ts tests/unit/domain-evidence.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/domain-migrations.test.ts

commands.name: Expanded dashboard audit volume hid a prior denial
commands.expectedFailure: All 127 non-browser tests passed, but the original AUT-01 denial journey timed out because routine read audits pushed the persisted denial outside the eight-event UI window

commands.name: Focused authority regression with retained denial visibility
Forged request envelope overrode signed route identity
commands.expectedFailure: A signed reviewer received 201 by placing a privacy-officer principal in the JSON body because the route spread untrusted fields after its trusted envelope

commands.name: Signed identity and URL scope override every JSON claim

scenarios.scenario: Likely real student data is blocked before it can be saved
Fictional teacher and student fields receive traceable run canaries
A different run cannot observe or reuse prior canaries

visualEvidence.rationale: Production screenshots will be captured and source-bound after the implementation commit exists.

proofs.description: Likely-real scan, reserved address, confirmation, generation, source mapping, and replay examples
Seeded PROP-16 field-set, run-pair, and cross-workspace uniqueness, mapping, replay, and non-deliverable address proof
PostgreSQL confirmation, scanner, audit minimization, foreign-key, global uniqueness, and immutability proof
Signed operator, bounded rejection, no-echo, idempotent generation, forged role, and cross-workspace HTTP proof
Blocked likely-real input, fictional teacher/student mapping, and cross-run isolation journeys
Playwright server-response assertions, raw-value absence, source mapping, run isolation, and visual capture
Bounded scanner, source-complete generator, permissioned service, in-memory and PostgreSQL repositories
Human confirmation, clear scan, persona foreign key, one-source mapping, global non-reuse, and generated-value constraints
Direct-language warning, blocked-input clearing, fictional confirmation, field selection, and prepared-run mappings
Signed persona create/list boundary with server-side rescanning
Signed run-specific generation and isolation boundary
Curated JRN-01 red/green record, bounded scanner claim, and explicit limitations

findings: Final production visual sanitization review is pending source-bound capture.

knownLimitations: The bounded scanner reduces obvious mistakes but cannot prove that an arbitrary value is fictional; production use still requires a synthetic tenant and manual privacy review.
The controlled browser fixture uses prepared in-memory run identifiers while PostgreSQL enforces real run and persona foreign keys.
Deterministic canary matching is owned by DET-02; JRN-01 generates and isolates the source values only.
Reserved .invalid addresses cannot receive mail, but Pactwire does not inspect external production account directories.
